title: RBI’s action on Paytm Payments Bank Limited has no financial impact and strong momentum, says company
content:
The Reserve Bank of India (RBI) has taken an unspecified action concerning Paytm Payments Bank Limited.
*   The company involved asserts that this RBI action will have no financial impact on its operations.
*   Despite the action, the company claims it is experiencing strong business momentum.

title: No restriction on women entering mosques, AIMPLB tells Supreme Court
content:
Here are 3 bullet points summarizing the headline:

*   The All India Muslim Personal Law Board (AIMPLB) has informed the Supreme Court.
*   They stated that there are no restrictions on women entering mosques.
*   This clarifies the board's official position regarding women's access to mosques.

title: Madras University invites applications from students for free education scheme
content:
Here are 3 bullet points summarizing the headline:

*   Madras University has initiated a free education scheme.
*   Applications are currently being accepted from students.
*   The program offers education completely free of charge.
